title: T-129 — UI: Pipeline SplitView + ProjectDetailPanel (split_view prototype) NPD-f slice of T-060
prompt:
# T-129 — Pipeline SplitView slice

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §17.12 + UX prototypes/design/01-NPD-UX.md split_view
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/pipeline.jsx:89-131 (SplitView)
Prototype-index entry: split_view
Parent root: T-060

## Goal
Two-component slice translating the SplitView prototype region into production: a left compact list + a right sticky ProjectDetail panel. Selecting a row updates the detail panel and URL ?selected=<projectId>; supports keyboard navigation (ArrowUp/Down/Enter); falls back to TableView below 1280 px breakpoint.

## Implementation contract
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_components/split-view.tsx ('use client'). Props: { projects: NpdProjectRow[] }. Renders shadcn ResizablePanelGroup (or grid) with left compact list (Card list, sticky) + right ProjectDetailPanel sticky aside; uses useSearchParams for ?selected= persistence; keyboard handler on the list updates selection.
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_components/project-detail-panel.tsx ('use client'). Props: { project: NpdProjectRow | null }. Renders shadcn Card with project summary (code, name, type, owner, gate, priority, target launch, progress, recent activity); empty state when project is null.
- Below 1280 px width the SplitView falls back to TableView (matchMedia or container query).
- No DB calls in either Client Component (parent RSC provides projects).

## Files (≤ 3)
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_components/split-view.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_components/project-detail-panel.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_components/__tests__/split-view.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given SplitView renders with a sample project list, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/pipeline.jsx:89-131 (SplitView), then it shows a left compact list + right sticky ProjectDetailPanel using shadcn Card + ResizablePanelGroup primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist
2. Given a user clicks or keyboard-navigates (ArrowDown/Enter) to a row, when the selection settles, then URL ?selected=<projectId> updates and ProjectDetailPanel renders that project's detail — verified by RTL router test
3. Given the viewport is < 1280 px wide, when SplitView mounts, then it falls back to TableView per §17.12 breakpoint contract — verified by RTL matchMedia test

## Test strategy
- RED: split-view.test.tsx asserting list + panel structure, ?selected= URL persistence, keyboard nav, 1280 px fallback — before components exist
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test split-view'

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
- Do not break the 1280 px responsive breakpoint contract
- Do not query DB from these Client Components
